## What

<!-- One or two sentences: what changes and why. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` and `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` are clean
- [ ] Facts added/updated for user-visible behavior changes (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] Docs updated if the CLI surface changed (README, docs/, man page, completions)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md entry added for user-visible changes
